app.title: Passport & Visa Photo Maker
disclaimer: This tool may use incorrect or outdated requirements. The author of this tool, and the tool itself, are not responsible for any losses caused by its use. Users who utilize this tool are liable for checking the updated requirements on government websites and assume full responsibility for the photos they create using this tool. By clicking "Agree" and continue, you confirm your agreement with this disclaimer.
disclaimer2: Your photo will be processed locally inside your browser. NO photos will be uploaded to any server. The only data shared are your access activities to this website, which are used for Google website analytics. By clicking 'Agree' and continuing, you confirm your agreement with this policy.
disclaimer3: We collect cookies to analyze our website traffic and performance, and we never collect any personal data. By clicking 'Agree' or continue use the website, you confirm your agreement with this policy.
backgroundRemovalError: Error on calling AI background removal, please refresh then retry.
backgroundRemovalIOS: AI Background Removal does NOT support iPhone or iPad, please use Android, macOS or Windows device.
backgroundRemovalReminder: It may take a while for the first time, please be patient...
autoAlignReminder: It may take a while for the first time, please be patient...
autoAlignNoFace: No face detected. Please use a clear, front-facing photo.
autoAlignError: Error on calling AI auto align, please refresh then retry.
checkPhotoError: Error on calling AI photo check, please refresh then retry.
photoIssuesTitle: We found some possible issues with your photo
photoIssuesIntro: Automated checks flagged the following. Please review before continuing:
checkNoFace: No face was detected in this photo.
checkMultipleFaces: More than one face was detected in this photo.
checkNotNeutral: Expression doesn't look neutral (smiling or mouth open).
checkHeadTilt: Head appears tilted or turned away from the camera.
checkFaceTooSmall: Face appears too small in the frame. Try moving closer or using a higher-resolution photo.
checkGlasses: Glasses may be detected. Many photo requirements don't allow glasses.
checkEarsCovered: Ears may not be visible (possibly covered by hair).
aiConfirmText: Click "Confirm" to allow downloading AI pre-trained models (~80MB for background removal, ~15MB for auto align). Each model only needs to download once for this session.
buyMeACoffeeButton: Like it? Buy me a coffee!
buyMeACoffeeWords: Anything is appreciated! A thank-you letter would make my day as well, I'm glad I can help!
